creator: root@bambam.lss.cp.philips.com
text:
I used sysinstall to create a partition after the initial installation.
	I added a new partition, and decided to label it without a bootblock.
	WHen I chose the W option (gives warning to only use it for after 
	installation usage) it dumped core when the window `creating initial
	devices' appeared. According to me, that window should not appear at
	all.
